title: Payroll Analyst (Banking)
description:
about the company

Our client is a global bank that was established over 150 years and with presence in more than 20 countries.

about the job

  • Execute end-to-end monthly payroll operations, accurately capturing all employee lifecycle movements including new hires, departures, and internal transitions
  • Manage out-of-cycle manual payments, including urgent tax settlements and final termination payouts
  • Perform comprehensive monthly reconciliations of payroll clearing accounts and general ledger activities
  • Develop and maintain rigorous procedural documentation, conducting periodic reviews to ensure alignment with both internal standards and evolving regulatory mandates
  • Uphold strict payroll governance by performing "four-eye" verification checks
  • Provide high-level customer service by resolving complex payroll inquiries and offering expert advisory support to the workforce
  • Oversee technical monthly and year-end tax reporting, including the execution of specialized tax clearance processes
  • Contribute to cross-border initiatives by sharing best practices and harmonizing payroll frameworks across regional international teams

skills and experience required

  • Minimum of 3 years experience in payroll
  • Good knowledge of SAP Payroll or other payroll systems and Workday
  • Good communication skills
  • Proficient at MS Word, MS Excel

To apply online please use the 'apply' function.

(EA: 94C3609/ R24124496)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
